description: VERIFIED LIVE: 36氪 (36Kr) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Article links (/p/<id>) carry the headline text. Navigate the tab to 36kr.com (home or a channel) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: 53 articles with headline and url extracted correctly.
